case_title: SHAUNESSY JOHNSON ET AL VS. EARL'S ORGANIC PRODUCE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100053639)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100044759), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, SHAUNESSY DAVIS, DAMION SERVED AUG-07-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION, MAILING DATE AUG-08-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT EARL'S ORGANIC PRODUCE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-02-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
